content:
Character: Alessandro Vieri
Perception: Leon is the well-dressed guy on the third floor — always looks like he's heading to a client dinner, smells like expensive cologne. We nod, exchange small talk. He seems friendly enough, not condescending the way some guys in suits can be. There's something familiar about him though — underneath the polish, he has the posture of someone who grew up around working people. I think he sees me as a reminder of something he left behind. I don't know much about him except he does something with cars and he's always alone. He's just a neighbor I don't mind running into.
